articles.title: Heatwave Alert! Odisha Govt Reveals Big Water Supply Plan | kanak News Shorts - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
Amid severe heatwave conditions across Odisha, the Panchayati Raj Department has revealed major steps being taken to provide drinking water to people in rural areas.
During a press conference, the Panchayati Raj Minister said that water is already being supplied to 20,837 villages through various projects. At present, the department is supplying water to over 32,232 villages through 207 major projects across the state.
The minister also announced that 82 additional water supply projects are expected to be completed by September, bringing further relief to people suffering due to extreme summer temperatures and water shortages.
Watch the full report for updates on Odisha heatwave, drinking water projects, rural water supply, Panchayati Raj department initiatives and latest Odisha government action plans.
